evals.prompt:
Run a documentation health audit on /tmp/vibecoding-proj/docs/guides/dev-setup.md.

Check all internal links and cross-references within the file. For each heading-level anchor, verify that any [text](#anchor) reference in the file actually matches the heading it links to.

Report: any anchor links that do not match their target heading (broken anchors).
evals.expected_output: Doctor detects two broken anchors: (1) '[port 3000](#running-on-a-different-port)' — heading is 'Running on a Different Port' (hyphen vs spaces mismatch), (2) '[Manual DB Setup](#manual-database-configuration)' — heading is 'Manual Database Configuration' (exact match, should work). The first is the clear violation. Baseline gives a generic content summary and does not know to check anchor-to-heading correspondence.
